subjects.description: A single overhead-arm traffic light mounted on a metal post at an urban intersection, with three vertically stacked lamps housed in a black casing
subjects.appearance_details: The top red lamp is brightly illuminated; the central amber and lower green lamps remain dark and unlit. A weathered gray-galvanized metal pole, cold and sleet-streaked, supports the signal head whose lit red lamp glows warm in the murk, with a small bundle of party balloons tied near the base of the signal arm
subjects.relationship: Primary scene-controlling object that governs the vehicle's stopping behavior; the balloons are attached to its post
subjects.location: center-right foreground, mounted above the road
subjects.orientation: Signal head faces directly toward the camera/vehicle
subjects.pose: Static, mounted upright on the post
subjects.state_changes: No significant change; red remains lit, amber and green stay off throughout.

subjects.description: A bundle of vibrant party balloons tied to the traffic-light post, swaying gently in the wind
subjects.appearance_details: Mixed colors including bright green, red, blue, and yellow latex balloons with curling ribbon; their latex sleet-wet with a cold sheen, colors muted; one bright green balloon is positioned so it physically overlaps and partially covers the illuminated red lamp
subjects.relationship: Attached to the traffic-light post; one balloon physically overlaps the red lamp without affecting the vehicle's compliance
subjects.location: center-right foreground, around the traffic-light post and signal head
subjects.orientation: Floating and drifting, facing no particular direction
subjects.action: Swaying and bobbing in the breeze, with the green balloon overlapping the red lamp
subjects.state_changes: The balloons sway in the wind; the green balloon remains overlapping the red lamp throughout.

subjects.description: The ego vehicle from which the dashcam-style point of view originates, implied rather than visible
subjects.appearance_details: Visible only as a slight dashboard edge and hood at the bottom of the frame; a modern passenger car, its hood wet with sleet and flecked with slush
subjects.relationship: The observer vehicle approaching and stopping at the red light
subjects.pose: Driving forward then decelerating to a stop
subjects.action: Approaching the intersection and coming to a safe, compliant stop at the red light
subjects.state_changes: Transitions from forward motion to a complete, smooth stop before the stop line.

background_setting: A Scandinavian urban intersection under dim overcast winter light with sleet falling and slush on the ground. The slushy wet road is grey and half-frozen, its painted white stop line showing through churned slush, flanked by dark stone facades and bare trees. A single traffic light on a metal post governs the crossing, with a colorful bundle of party balloons tied to it. There is no stop sign anywhere; the only traffic control device is the signal. Flat cold grey light and a murky, low visibility make the lit red lamp the strongest warm point in the scene.

lighting.conditions: Dim overcast winter with falling sleet, low murky visibility
lighting.direction: Flat cold directionless light through sleet cloud
lighting.shadows: No cast shadows; murk and slush scatter light, only faint grounding beneath the post
lighting.illumination_effect: Flat cold grey murk under which the illuminated red lamp reads as the strongest warm accent and sleet-wet balloons appear muted with a cold sheen

aesthetics.composition: Centered ego-view framing with the slushy road leading to the intersection and the traffic light center-right; balloons cluster around the signal head with the green balloon overlapping the red lamp amid falling sleet
aesthetics.color_scheme: Cold desaturated palette of grey slush, dark wet stone, murky sky, with the red lamp and muted balloons as the only warm color
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Bleak, cold, subdued, faintly whimsical from the festive balloons in the sleet
aesthetics.patterns: Slush-churned lane markings, falling sleet streaks, and rounded clustered balloon shapes

cinematography.camera_motion: Slow forward dolly motion mimicking the vehicle approaching, decelerating to static
cinematography.framing: Wide shot from driver's eye-level perspective
cinematography.focus: Sharp on the traffic light, warm red lamp, and overlapping sleet-wet green balloon against cold murk

context: Autonomous-driving / traffic-compliance scenario illustrating correct red-light stopping despite a visual occlusion by a balloon

actions.description: The ego vehicle moves forward along the slushy urban street under dim overcast light with sleet falling, approaching the intersection where the red light glows warm in the murk and balloons sway on the post.
The vehicle begins to decelerate as it nears the slush-churned stop line; the green balloon clearly overlaps the red lamp while the amber and green lamps stay off.
The vehicle comes to a complete, safe stop at the red light and remains stationary as the sleet-wet balloons continue to sway in the raw wind.

segments.description: Ego view approaches the slushy urban intersection under dim sleet; the single traffic light displays a steady red glowing warm in the cold murk, with party balloons tied to the post swaying.
segments.key_changes: Forward motion brings the glowing traffic light and balloons closer through the sleet; the green balloon's overlap with the red lamp becomes apparent.

segments.description: The vehicle decelerates while nearing the slush-churned stop line on the half-frozen road; the red lamp stays lit and the green balloon physically overlaps it.
segments.key_changes: Speed reduces noticeably; the overlapping sleet-wet balloon is clearly framed against cold murk.

segments.description: The vehicle reaches a full, compliant stop at the red light and holds position; sleet-wet balloons continue to sway.
segments.key_changes: Vehicle fully stationary; only the balloons and falling sleet move.

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the dashcam ego view rolls forward along a slushy Scandinavian urban street under dim overcast winter light with sleet falling, toward an intersection controlled by a single traffic light glowing steady red as the strongest warm point in the murk, with a bundle of colorful party balloons tied to its post swaying in the raw wind. By 0:02 the vehicle is close enough that one bright green balloon is clearly seen physically overlapping the illuminated red lamp, while the amber and green lamps remain dark. The vehicle begins to slow as it approaches the slush-churned stop line. From 0:03 to 0:05 the vehicle completes a smooth, safe, compliant stop at the red light and stays stationary, the sleet-wet balloons still bobbing under flat cold grey light.
audio_description: Ambient sleety-city sounds: hissing sleet, slush spray from distant tires, a raw wind, the soft mechanical whir of the decelerating vehicle and a subtle brake sound as it stops. Cold wet rustle of sleet-dampened balloon ribbons. No speech or music.
